params.TriggerDescription: When you planeswalk to CARDNAME and at the beginning of your upkeep, create two 1/1 colorless Sliver creature tokens.
When you planeswalk to CARDNAME and at the beginning of your upkeep, create two 1/1 colorless Sliver creature tokens.
Whenever chaos ensues, Slivers you control gain haste and get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of Slivers you control.
